preamble: Denasalization and lowering of the nasalized close back rounded vowel [ũ] to the close-mid back rounded vowel [o]. This shift involves loss of nasality combined with lowering of vowel height, occurring through denasalization processes in Romance language evolution.

examples.note: In Romance denasalization evolution, nasalized high back vowels undergo denasalization with lowering toward mid vowel space.
In some Portuguese dialects, nasalized [ũ] becomes denasalized and lowers in casual speech before non-nasal obstruents.

related.label: Denasalization of close-mid back nasal vowel
